description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine three_wnd_imped_data_4, and is implemented by a call to three_wnd_imped_data_4. Use this API routine to modify the impedance data of an existing three-winding transformer in the working case, or to add a new three-winding transformer to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Non-Transformer Branch Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, realaro = three_wnd_imped_data_3(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, intgar, realari, charar)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = three_wnd_imped_data_3(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, intgar, realari, charar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number one of the other buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Bus number of the third bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of seventeen elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(1) through REALAR(17) as described above. (input).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of six elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(18) through REALAR(23) as described above. (output).

intgar.description: O1, first owner number (owner of bus IBUS by default).
O2, second owner number (0 by default).
O3, third owner number (0 by default).
O4, fourth owner number (0 by default).
CW, winding data I/O code (1 by default).
CZ, impedance data I/O code (1 by default).
CM, magnetizing admittance data I/O code (1 by default).
NMETBS, non-metered end bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS) (JBUS by default).
WN1BUS, winding one side bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS) (IBUS by default).
WN2BUS, winding two side bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS) (JBUS by default).
WN3BUS, winding three side bus number (IBUS, JBUS or KBUS) (KBUS by default).

realari.description: R1-2, nominal bus one to two transformer resistance (0.0 by default).
X1-2, nominal bus one to two transformer reactance (0.0002 by default).
R2-3, nominal bus two to three transformer resistance (0.0 by default).
X2-3, nominal bus two to three transformer reactance (0.0002 by default).
R3-1, nominal bus three to one transformer resistance (0.0 by default).
X3-1, nominal bus three to one transformer reactance (0.0002 by default).
SBS1-2, winding one to two base MVA (SBASE by default).
SBS2-3, winding two to three base MVA (SBASE by default).
SBS3-1, winding three to one base MVA (SBASE by default).
MAG1, magnetizing conductance or no-load losses (0.0 by default).
MAG2, magnetizing susceptance or exciting current (0.0 by default).
F1, first owner fraction (1.0 by default).
F2, second owner fraction (0.0 by default).
F3, third owner fraction (0.0 by default).
F4, fourth owner fraction (0.0 by default).
VMSTAR, star bus voltage magnitude (1.0 by default).
TAR, star bus voltage angle (0.0 by default).

charar.description: VGRP, vector group name (blank by default).

realaro.description: actual bus one to two resistance (returned).
actual bus one to two reactance (returned).
actual bus two to three resistance (returned).
actual bus two to three reactance (returned).
actual bus three to one resistance (returned).
actual bus three to one reactance (returned).

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
invalid CW, CZ and/or CM value.
CW, CZ and/or CM >1 but at least one endpoint bus has no base voltage.
three different buses must be specified.
transformer circuit identifier may not start with &, * or @
not enough branch table entries are available.
not enough two-winding transformer table entries are available.
not enough branch ownership table entries are available.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Invalid set of winding buses. - Invalid CW, CZ and/or CM data value. - Invalid transformer status. - Invalid non-metered end bus. - Winding side buses interchanged. - Losses are too big relative to total impedance at winding base MVA. - Magnitude of winding impedance is less than 0.00001. - Vector group not found. - Any two-winding transformer warnings.
